testcase.name: test_deposit_has_broker_commission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_fx_commission.py:198: in test_deposit_has_broker_commission assert response.status_code == 200, f"Transaction failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Transaction failed: {"detail":"Possible duplicate: Similar transaction created 2026-02-25T16:48:39.982974+00:00 (Transaction ID: tx_9c79f31017c8). Wait 5 minutes or use a unique reference."} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_withdrawal_has_broker_commission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_fx_commission.py:237: in test_withdrawal_has_broker_commission assert response.status_code == 200, f"Transaction failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Transaction failed: {"detail":"Possible duplicate: Similar transaction created 2026-02-25T16:48:47.634909+00:00 (Transaction ID: tx_342cf09a1f9f). Wait 5 minutes or use a unique reference."} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
